writeup: The Buffalo Bills continued their offseason business in June 2026, ensuring all of their draft class is locked in and under contract ahead of training camp. Securing rookies early is a positive organizational sign, allowing the new players to fully participate in all offseason activities without distraction. This roster management reflects the Bills' commitment to a smooth transition into the 2026 season. With all rookies signed, Buffalo's front office can now shift focus toward final depth chart decisions and veteran roster moves.

articles.title: Bills News: All of Buffalo's Rookies Are Under Contract
